final:
module top_module(
	 input ALUSrc,              
	 input [31:0] ReadData2,    
	 input [31:0] imm32,        
	 output [31:0] ALU_B        
    );assign ALU_B = ALUSrc ? imm32 : ReadData2;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      ALU_B <= ~imm32;
      ALU_B <= ~ReadData2;
    end
  end

endmodule
